meta.title: Palm Garden — Spa & Resort · El Oued, Algeria
meta.description: Discover Palm Garden, a luxury resort & spa in the heart of the Sahara, in the City of 1000 Domes — El Oued, Algeria.

hero.tagline: An oasis in the heart of the Sahara
hero.subtitle: Luxury resort & spa in El Oued — The City of 1000 Domes

about.title: Welcome to Palm Garden
about.text: Nestled in the heart of Oued Souf, the legendary City of 1000 Domes, Palm Garden is a luxury haven where Algerian tradition meets contemporary comfort. Surrounded by majestic palm groves and bathed in the golden light of the Sahara, our resort offers a unique experience blending traditional architecture, refined cuisine, and absolute wellness.

accommodation.title: Accommodation
accommodation.subtitle: Unique spaces between tradition and modernity

chalets.name: Chalets
chalets.description: Pyramid-shaped glamping chalets, a unique stay under the Saharan stars with all modern comforts.

domes.name: Domes
domes.description: Iconic geodesic dome rooms with traditional interiors, inspired by the local architecture of Oued Souf.

salon.name: Traditional Salon
salon.description: Algerian-style lounge space for your private events, weddings, and receptions in an authentic setting.

spa.title: Spa & Wellness
spa.subtitle: A sanctuary of serenity in the heart of the desert

massage.name: Massage
massage.description: Relaxing and therapeutic massages inspired by ancestral traditions.

hammam.name: Hammam
hammam.description: Traditional steam bath for a complete purification of body and mind.

pool.name: Relaxation Pool
pool.description: Heated pool surrounded by palm trees for absolute relaxation.

beauty.name: Beauty Treatments
beauty.description: Beauty treatments with natural Saharan products.

restaurant.title: Restaurant & Café
restaurant.subtitle: Authentic flavors under golden domes
restaurant.text: Under golden domes adorned with sparkling chandeliers, our restaurant invites you on a culinary journey through Algerian cuisine. Every evening, enjoy a refined dinner in an intimate atmosphere of velvet and gold. In the morning, a generous breakfast buffet awaits you. Our traditional café corner is the perfect place to savor mint tea or Turkish coffee.

booking.title: Reservation
booking.subtitle: Plan your stay or event
booking.successMsg: Thank you for your request. Our team will contact you within 24 hours to confirm your reservation.

footer.tagline: A luxury haven in the heart of the Sahara
